item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Laws in Indonesia often prioritize preventing harm to the broader population, even if it means limiting certain freedoms.

notes: Agent A begins with a formal disagreement but becomes more society-priority by turn 3 and turn 5; Agent B remains consistently rights-first with only narrow safety/equality exceptions. Agent B turn 4 contains a CJK script artifact inside an English turn: "The印尼 argument".
